tasks.prompt:
Run the nightly portfolio analysis check. Do the following steps in order:

1. Run watchlist check: `cd /Users/yogesh.sharma/.claude/skills/financial-analyst-skill/agents/scripts && python3 watchlist_check.py`
2. Run portfolio review: `python3 portfolio_review.py`
3. Load the latest verdicts from `/Users/yogesh.sharma/.claude/skills/financial-analyst-skill/data/verdicts.jsonl` and sr_levels from `data/sr_levels.jsonl`
4. Check if any watchlist stock has hit or is within 2% of its Patient Entry price from Task #2 (UBER $74, BRK-B $470, AMZN $259, GOOGL $378, ASML $1488, NVDA $211, SHOP $105)
5. Check if any held position (META, MSFT, NFLX, TEAM, TSLA) has breached its stop-loss
6. Report a concise summary: TRIGGERED entries, STOP-LOSS breaches, and any position needing immediate action. If nothing changed, say "No changes — all positions within range."
